sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16144" key="a)selgo/kerws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσελγό-κερως</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n16144.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with outrageous horn,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κριός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:210" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">210</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
